/usr/local/cuda/bin/nvcc -forward-unknown-to-host-compiler  --generate-code=arch=compute_52,code=[compute_52,sm_52] -Xcompiler=-fPIC -Wno-deprecated-gpu-targets -shared -dlink CMakeFiles/mini_cuda_llm_cuda.dir/src/vector_add.cu.o CMakeFiles/mini_cuda_llm_cuda.dir/src/vector_add_advanced.cu.o -o CMakeFiles/mini_cuda_llm_cuda.dir/cmake_device_link.o   -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
